questions.question: Choose the word that is most similar to: 'ENORMOUS' is to 'TINY' as 'FAST' is to:
questions.explanation: Enormous and Tiny are antonyms (opposites). Similarly, Fast and Slow are antonyms. The relationship is: word : its antonym. Quick/Rapid are synonyms of Fast; Speed is a noun form. Slow is the antonym of Fast.

questions.question: Statement: Some apples are oranges. Some oranges are grapes. Conclusion I: Some apples are grapes. Conclusion II: No apple is a grape.
questions.explanation: From 'some apples are oranges' and 'some oranges are grapes', we cannot determine the relationship between apples and grapes definitively. It's possible some apples are grapes (if the overlapping oranges are those both). It's equally possible no apples are grapes. Since both are equally possible and one must be true, 'Either I or II follows'.

questions.question: 'Biography' is to 'Person' as 'Autobiography' is to:
questions.explanation: Biography: a book about a person's life written by someone else. Autobiography: a book about a person's own life, written by themselves. The relationship: type of life story : whose life it is about.

questions.question: 'France : Paris :: Germany : ___'
questions.explanation: Paris is the capital of France. Berlin is the capital of Germany. Capital city relationship.

questions.question: Complete: 'Window is to Glass as Door is to ___'
questions.explanation: A Window is primarily made of Glass (functional material). A Door is primarily made of Wood. The relationship is: architectural feature : its primary material.

questions.question: 'Marathon : Long :: Sprint : ___'
questions.explanation: A Marathon is a Long distance race. A Sprint is a Short distance race. The relationship is: type of race : its distance characteristic.

questions.question: 'Tailor : Cloth :: Mason : ___'
questions.explanation: A Tailor works with Cloth (craftsperson : material they work with). A Mason works with Cement/Stone (brick and mortar). The relationship is: craftsperson : their primary material.

questions.question: Choose the pair that has a similar relationship as 'Sculptor : Statue':
questions.explanation: A Sculptor creates a Statue (creator : what they create). Similarly, an Author creates a Novel. A Reader reads a book (doesn't create). A Singer performs a song. A Teacher works at a school (not creates it).

questions.question: 'Arid : Dry :: Fertile : ___'
questions.explanation: Arid means extremely Dry. Similarly, Fertile means very Productive (especially of land — fertile land is highly productive for growing crops). The relationship is synonym pairs.

questions.question: 'Hard work : Success :: Laziness : ___'
questions.explanation: Hard work leads to Success. Laziness leads to Failure. The relationship is: cause : effect.

questions.question: Pointing to a man, a woman said, 'His mother is the only daughter of my mother.' How is the woman related to the man?
questions.explanation: The woman's mother's only daughter is the woman herself. Therefore, the man's mother is the woman.

questions.question: If A is the brother of B, C is the father of A, and D is the mother of C, then how is B related to D?
questions.explanation: C is the father of A and B, so D is the grandmother of A and B. Thus, B is D's grandchild.

questions.question: If A is the brother of B, C is the father of A, and D is the brother of E, who is the daughter of B, then who is the uncle of D?
questions.explanation: D's mother is B. A is B's brother, making A the uncle of D.

questions.question: Pointing to a man in a photograph, a woman says, 'He is the only son of my father's mother-in-law.' How is the man related to the woman?
questions.explanation: The woman's father's mother-in-law is her paternal grandmother. The only son of her paternal grandmother is her maternal uncle.

questions.question: A is the brother of B. C is the daughter of A. D is the sister of E. E is the son of B. How is C related to D?
questions.explanation: A and B are siblings. C is A's daughter. E is B's son, and D is E's sister, meaning D is also B's daughter. Therefore, C and D are cousins.

questions.question: Introducing a girl, a boy said, 'She is the daughter of the father of my uncle's sister.' How is the girl related to the boy?
questions.explanation: The boy's uncle's sister is either his mother or his aunt. The father of his mother/aunt is his grandfather. The daughter of his grandfather can be his mother or his aunt. Since it's a girl, she is his sister.

questions.question: P is the husband of Q. R is the mother of S and Q. T is the only daughter of R. How is T related to P?
questions.explanation: Q is P's wife. R is Q's mother. T is R's only daughter. Since Q is also R's daughter, T and Q are the same person. Therefore, T is P's wife, making her P's sister-in-law if there was another sibling, but as it's 'only daughter', T is Q.

questions.question: If 'A + B' means 'A is the father of B', 'A - B' means 'A is the mother of B', 'A x B' means 'A is the brother of B', and 'A ÷ B' means 'A is the sister of B', then which of the following means 'P is the maternal uncle of Q'?
questions.explanation: P is the maternal uncle of Q means P is the brother of Q's mother. In option (A), M is the mother of Q (M - Q) and P is the brother of M (P x M).

questions.question: Pointing to a photograph, a man says, 'I have no brother or sister, but that man's father is my father's son.' Whose photograph is it?
questions.explanation: The man has no siblings, so his father's son must be himself. Therefore, the man in the photograph's father is the speaker himself, making the man in the photograph his son.

questions.question: Introducing a girl, a boy said, 'She is the daughter of the mother of my mother's only son.' How is the boy related to the girl?
questions.explanation: The boy's mother's only son is the boy himself. The mother of the boy's mother's only son is the boy's mother. So, the girl is the daughter of the boy's mother, making her his sister.

questions.question: A is the father of B. C is the daughter of A. D is the brother of B. E is the mother of D. F is the brother of E. G is the daughter of F. How is G related to C?
questions.explanation: E is the mother of D and B, and A is their father. So, A and E are married. F is E's brother, making him C's maternal uncle. G is F's daughter, so G is C's cousin.

questions.question: If 'P @ Q' means 'P is the father of Q', 'P # Q' means 'P is the sister of Q', 'P $ Q' means 'P is the wife of Q', and 'P % Q' means 'P is the mother of Q', then which of the following expressions means 'M is the granddaughter of T'?
questions.explanation: T % K means T is the mother of K. K @ M means K is the father of M. So, T is the grandmother of M, and M is the granddaughter of T.

questions.question: Pointing to a lady, a man said, 'The son of her only brother is the husband of my wife's sister.' How is the lady related to the man?
